steps.title: Read the boundary line
steps.content:
The boundary line has y-intercept $6$ and slope $-4$, so its equation is
$$y=-4x+6$$

steps.title: Use the shaded side
steps.content: The shaded region is below the boundary line, so the inequality uses $<$. The boundary is not included, so the inequality is strict.

steps.title: Match the inequality
steps.content: The inequality is $y<-4x+6$, which matches choice A. The answer is A.
